name: mern-auth-app
description: MERN Stack Auth App with JWT + Refresh Tokens + MUI

scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run copy:env
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.copy:env: cp backend/.env.example backend/.env && echo "✅ .env created from .env.example — please edit backend/.env with your MONGO_URI"
